questions.question: Describe the significance of a safety culture in an organization and how business management strategies can contribute to its development. (10 marks)
What is the role of independent oversight in ensuring trustworthy certification, and explain its benefits in maintaining a reliable system? (15 marks)

An organization has implemented a safety culture program, which includes regular employee training and incident reporting. Analyze the impact of this program on the organization's overall risk management strategy. (12 marks)
